questions.text: Demand confirmation to NEOMRP AFMs is propagated using the FCC (Factory Constraint Confirmation) for all affiliates.
When a code is sent to IDC before quality release and AID-TL+1>Local GR, the end date in the inbound delivery CIF-ed to APO, corresponds to the expected reception of the stock
GR (Goods Receipt) Time is calculated using the formula: GR = MAX(AID + 1 - TL; Local GR).
The subcontractor and the ESC (External Sourcing Center) are treated as the same location in the NEO co-packing process.
